title: Better MC [FABRIC] - BMC2
description: Version 1.20 | A Proper Vanilla+ Modpack | Don't play Vanilla play this!
body:
![In purple text and white text, "BETTER MINECRAFT" is displayed infront of a screenshot of the Minecraft Overworld. The background image has a tree with purple leaves on both sides.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70cead9de9ef1c6d61fc38dc356d7141b3a8d6d.jpeg)

![In all-caps bold text, the word "FEATURES". ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

✔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-mc-fabric-bmc2)

✔️ 100+ Quests

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation ([Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade), [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic))

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortresses

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs ([Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction), [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful))

✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [AdoraBuild: Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorabuild-structures))

✔️ QoL Features such as [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [XP Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-storage)

✔️ [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) with Additional Features

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

✔️ Built-in, [Free World Sharing](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tLTC6wYcWVM)

✔️ [280+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/64017/better-mc-fabric-bmc2)

[![Live count of how many members are online in the Luna Pixel Studios discord server.](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)

[![Use code LUNAPIXEL for 25% off Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c3d1af34a17cb45f2ba4b9cfca4bd54d1c857ef.png)](https://lunapixel.studio/bisect)
